_comment: Stage 14.9-14.12: dev/test/live instance registry for manage.ps1 -Env and promote.ps1. All three share the one portable Postgres server already used for dev (localhost:5435) but use separate databases - full data isolation without provisioning 3 separate Postgres clusters on one dev machine. dev runs directly out of this working tree (no worktree); test/live are separate git worktrees so they can run a different commit than whatever's currently checked out here.
